TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Labuwan, title = Labuwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Labuwan} }

S.FORM: alang Labuwan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 490 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 480 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 92%, Paywan 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Labuwan hya' ga Kinulane. tay 'zil na Labuwan hya' ga Kabalelradhane. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Labuwan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 490 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 480 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 92%, Paywan 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Labuwan hya' ga Kinulane. tay 'zil na Labuwan hya' ga Kabalelradhane. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ laβuwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na laβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa kinulane. taj ʔzil na laβuwan ħjaʔ ɣa kaβalelra*ħane. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
